case_title: LENORE ALFORD VS. CORD STRUCKMANN ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-24-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LENORE ALFORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORD STRUCKMANN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUAN ALFONSO C. CANAS IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREIN DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $485.00 TO RESOLVE. PROGRESS REPORT HEARING SET FOR MARCH 24, 2023 AT 3:30 PM. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ("DWP") IF NO APPEARANCES. ENTER JUDGMENT IN SAME IF THERE IS AN APPEARANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
